items.title: On the Cusp
items.description: NTU Museum presents an art exhibition featuring regional artists Boedi Widjaja, Torlarp Larpjaroensook and Tromarama.
items.location: Various locations within Nanyang Technological University: Nanyang Lake Pavilion, Chinese Heritage Centre, North Spine Plaza
items.content: NTU Museum presents an art exhibition featuring regional artists Boedi Widjaja, Torlarp Larpjaroensook and Tromarama.

items.title: Professor Chen Charng Ning Distinguished Lecture 2026
items.description: In recognition of Prof Chen Charn Ning’s contributions to tertiary education in SG, engineering professions, and industries.
items.location: Auditorium, NTU@one-north, 11 Slim Barracks Rise, Singapore 138664
items.content: In recognition of Prof Chen Charn Ning’s contributions to tertiary education in SG, engineering professions, and industries.
